testcase.name: testPrintReceiptDoesNotThrow
testcase.system-out: ===== TICKET RECEIPT ===== Customer: John Doe Game: Lakers vs Warriors Date: Oct 22, 2024 Quantity: 3 Total Amount: $450.00 ==========================
